name: spo-ai-skills-upload
title: Upload SharePoint AI Skills to Agent Assets
shortDescription: Upload a SKILL.md file into the SharePoint Agent Assets > Skills folder for a target site.
longDescription: Check that Agent Assets is enabled on a SharePoint site, validate the Agent Assets library and Skills folder path, and upload a local SKILL.md file into the requested skills subfolder.

thumbnails.alt: Preview of the sample Upload SharePoint AI Skills to Agent Assets

references.name: Want to learn more about PnP PowerShell and the cmdlets
references.description: Check out the PnP PowerShell site to get started and for the reference to the cmdlets.
